commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `tokenizeCommand` in `src/agents/bash-tools.shared.ts` to avoid ambiguous quoted-span regex backtracking and adds `deriveSessionName` regression tests for quoted and backslash-heavy commands.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +26. Total +26 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main's `deriveSessionName` reaches the ambiguous regex from stored `session.command`, and the PR body includes before/after timing proof for the production helper; this read-only review verified the source path rather than running timing tests.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair job is needed because the patch has no blocking findings and is already on the automerge path; exact-head checks should gate landing.

target.title: fix(agents): prevent ReDoS in background-session name derivation
